title: Sheet Metal K-Factor Calculator
description: Calculate the K-factor for sheet metal bending.

Material_Thickness.description: Material Thickness (T). Symbol: T. Units: mm. Thickness of the sheet metal.

Inner_Radius.description: Inner Radius (Rᵢ). Symbol: R_i. Units: mm. Inner radius of the sheet metal bend.

Bend_Angle.description: Bend Angle (θ). Symbol: θ. Units: °. The angle of bending of the sheet metal.

Bend_Allowance.description: Bend Allowance (BA). Symbol: B_A. Units: mm. The bend allowance. This is the total length of the flat piece of metal that will be deformed or stretched during the bending process.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
